profile_summary: Backend-focused engineer with strong Python and API design experience, open to adjacent platform work.

strong_fit_signals: Pragmatic engineering culture with code quality focus
acceptable_but_intermediate_signals: Partial backend role mixed with some frontend work
Modern JavaScript/TypeScript stack with backend depth still required
misaligned_signals: Predominantly frontend role with little backend ownership
No Python or API/system design responsibilities

interpretation_rules: Prefer concrete scope and delivery ownership over broad marketing language
Treat missing compensation and level details as uncertainty, not automatic rejection
